Oil Filters - Black - 12-Pack
Sturdy steel canister houses the finest filtering media and internal components available
Canister is slightly smaller in diameter than stock filters to make them easier to remove and install
Designed with a direct bypass valve that routes bypass oil directly to the filter exit, which minimizes the amount of contaminants carried to the engine in the unfiltered bypass oil
The nominal particle capture size is smaller than that of stock filters while the resistance to oil flow is nearly the same
Includes drain plug O-ring with filter
Made in the USA

Ring Set
Complete set of piston rings
Made in the U.S.A.
Breather Reed Valves - Crankcase - Standard - Evolution Big Twin '93-'99

New-style breather is not dependent on the rotation of the crankshaft to make it open and close. Instead, reeds open when pressure in the crankcase becomes greater than pressure in the cam chest, and close when pressure in the cam chest is equal to or greater than pressure in the crankcase

By opening and closing "on demand," the reed valves automatically compensate for lag time associated with accelerating the mass of air as it is forced out of the crankcase, increasing performance and stopping high-rpm oil carryover in engines with marginal piston ring seal
Installation is fast and simple; no aligning timing marks, and no rotating parts
Made in the USA
Right Side Crankcase Bearing Race - Standard - Sportster
Made in the USA
Camshaft - 640 Series - Evolution Big Twin '84-'99
For large displacement engines 110" and larger with 10.5:1 to 11.5:1 compression and smaller engines, 96"-107" with 11.0:1 to 12.0:1 compression
Less overlap and fast ramps build higher cylinder pressure
Lower TDC lift makes installation easier
Designed for use with hydraulic tappets
Made in the USA
Installer must check coil bind, valve-to-valve clearance, valve-to-piston clearance and cam lobe to case clearance.
Requires high-lift springs.
Cam Bearing Retention Plate - Twin Cam '99-'06 (except '06 Dyna)
Heavy-duty cam bearing retention plate is recommended for use with all gear-drive cams and is included in S&S complete gear-drive cam kits
Made in the USA
Also fits T-Series engines using '99-'06 cam plates.
Camshaft - 510V - Evolution Big Twin
S&S Cams are tested on the dyno, street and track before being offered to the public
With hundreds of hours of testing on each cam, you know you are getting the best cam S&S can produce
S&S' best bolt-in cam
Works with stock pushrods, springs and hydraulic tappets
Ideal for engines to 96" up to 10:1 compression
No spring spacing required
Made in the U.S.A.
Installer must check coil bind, valve-to-valve clearance, valve-to-piston clearance and cam lobe to case clearance.
Over Sized Pinion Gear
A four-gear set is required for gear-driven cams that do not come with secondary cam gears; includes two secondary cam gears, outer cam drive gear, outer pinion drive gear and mounting hardware
Due to the inherent characteristics of gear drives, you may experience more valve train noise with gear driven cams; oversized and undersized gears are available to help achieve correct gear lash
Made in the USA
It is the installer’s responsibility to check all clearances and follow all procedures in the S&S instructions and Harley-Davidson manual.
Camshaft Kit - 570G Gear Drive - Twin Cam
Designed for 88" to 103" CID engines with compression ratios between 9:1 and 10:1
Strongest from 3200-3700 rpm
Increases valve timing accuracy by eliminating timing chain lash and loosely fit stock chain drive
Reverses the rear cam's direction of rotation, providing additional operating clearance between cam lobes resulting in higher cam lifts
Material must be removed from inner surface of stock gear cover to install
A hydraulic press and other professional level tools required to install kit
S&S recommends that adjustable pushrod/cover kit be used
Cam bearings and gasket must be replaced when installing new cams
Kit includes camshafts, gearcover gasket, bearings, oil passage block off kit, retaining ring, o-ring, inner and outer gears
Made in the USA
Due to the inherent characteristics of gear drives, you may experience more valve train noise.
Installer must check coil bind, valve to valve clearance and valve to piston clearance.
Camshaft Kit - 625G - Gear Drive - Twin Cam
For 95/96/103 and 110 cubic inch engines with compression ratios from 10.0 to 10.75:1
Strongest from 3000-6000 rpm
Increase valve timing accuracy by eliminating timing chain lash and loosely-fit stock chain drive
Reverses the rear cam's direction of rotation, providing additional operating clearance between cam lobes, as a result, higher cam lifts are possible
Material must be removed from inner surface of the stock gear cover to install
A hydraulic press and other professional level tools are required to install the kit
High lift valve springs and adjustable pushrods required
Camshaft bearings and gaskets must be replaced when installing new camshafts
Kit includes camshafts, inner gear, outer drive gears, inner, outer bearings, gasket and instructions
Made in the USA
Installer must check coil bind, valve to valve clearance and valve to piston clearance.
Due to inherent characteristics of gear drives, you may experience more valve train noise.
Camshaft Kit - 640 Gear Drive - Twin Cam '07-'17 | Dyna '06
For 103/110 CI engines
Strongest from 3000-6000 rpm
Compression ratios from 10.5:1 to 11.5:1
Improves valve timing accuracy by eliminating timing chain lash
Includes camshaft, inner and outer gears, gear cover gasket, oil passage block-off kit, retaining ring, and o-ring
High-lift springs and adjustable pushrods required.
Flywheel Assembly - 4.00" - w/o Sprocket Bearing Race - 88"/95"/100" Twin Cam "B" '00-'02
S&S 3-piece flywheels with integral main shafts are the strongest yet, made from 4140 steel and feature a larger 1.671" crankpin
Fits directly in stock crankcases with no modifications
Made in the U.S.A.
Flywheel assembly without sprocket bearing race are designed for use with Timken bearing conversion (sold separately).
Camshaft Kit - High Performance - Royal Enfield® 650 Twins
Adjustable cam timing so you can dial in the power curve
Builds power sooner and holds it for longer
Compatible with high-compression pistons
Higher lift and longer duration than the stock cam
Includes camshaft and shims
Made in the USA
Cam Chest Kit with Plate - Gear Drive - Water Cooled - 465 Cam - Chrome Pushrods - M8
All parts in each kit are matched to ensure superior quality, fit, finish and performance
Oil pump and cam plate are precision-machined from billet aluminum with a blue anodized finish
Passage plugs removable for servicing
Independent scavenge sections for the flywheel cavity and cam chest
Debris screens in both scavenge pickups
Increased oil flow capacity on both the feed and scavenge sides
Adjustable Pressure Relief Valve is adjustable with unit installed in engine
Magnet in cam chest to help to stop debris from entering oil pump
S&S Quickee Pushrods with finished pushrod tubes
S&S premium tappets
Billet aluminum tappet cuffs have a hard-anodized black coating and are stronger than stock to eliminate distortion
Improved tappet stability in high-lift and high-rpm situations
Provides improved cam timing accuracy and eliminates the stock cam chain tensioner
Includes outer drive gears, all gaskets, bearings, and hardware required for a complete installation
Made in the USA

Flywheel - 4-3/8" - with Sprocket Bearing Race - Touring '07-'17 | Dyna '06-'17
For 96"/103"/106" big bore | 110"/117" engine with stock or S&S pistons (will be noted)
Fully assembled with premium quaility S&S® heavy duty 7.659" connecting rods, with full width wrist pin ends, and dynamically balanced
Trued to less than .0005" runout on pinion and sprocket shaft bearing surfaces, making them capable of higher rpm and fully compatible with gear drive cams
CNC machined from heat-treated, closed die, steel forgings, which are 114% stronger than late style stock steel flywheels
The only joints in the assembly are where the 1.671" diameter connecting rod crankpin is pressed into the flywheels
Pinion and sprocket shafts are forged as part of the flywheel
Made in the USA

The only joints in the assembly are where the 1.671" diameter connecting rod crankpin is pressed into the flywheels

Three piece design

Flywheel - 84" Stock Bore Stroker - Big Twin
Stock Bore Stroker Flywheel Kit 84"
Upgrades 74" and 80" Shovelhead engines to 84" displacement at approximately 8.4:1 or 7.3:1 compression (depending on pistons used)
Includes a dynamically balanced 4-1/2" stroke flywheel assembly complete with S&S heavy-duty connecting rods and mainshafts
Reuse the stock cylinders, saving cost and retaining stock appearance of the engine
Minor crankcase and cylinder modifications are required that can easily be done with hand tools
Kit requires special pistons which must be ordered separately (Contact S&S for required pistons)

Camshaft Kit - Easy Start - 551 Chain Drive - Twin Cam '07-'17

Allows for easy start by initially reducing crank compression, but once the engine starts and rpm increases, the compression release lobe is centrifugally retracted and the engine runs normally, with full compression, and without any loss in performance
Optimized for 88"/96"/103" to 106" Touring bike with slip-on mufflers and 9.0:1 to 9.0:9 compression with stock starter
Bolt-in for stock or mildly modified Touring models
Greatly improves low-end and midrange torque
Strongest from idle to 4000 rpm
Includes camshafts, gearcover gasket, bearings, retaining ring, o-ring, threat lock and instructions
Made in the USA
Not recommended for compression ratios of 10.0:1 or greater.
Installer must check coil bind, valve-to-valve clearance and valve-to-piston clearance.
Not for models with OEM compression releases.
Can be used with stock pushrods, lifters, and springs (unless noted).

Breather Reed Valves - Crankcase - +0.030" Oversize - Evolution Big Twin '93-'99

New-style breather is not dependent on the rotation of the crankshaft to make it open and close. Instead, reeds open when pressure in the crankcase becomes greater than pressure in the cam chest, and close when pressure in the cam chest is equal to or greater than pressure in the crankcase

By opening and closing "on demand," the reed valves automatically compensate for lag time associated with accelerating the mass of air as it is forced out of the crankcase, increasing performance and stopping high-rpm oil carryover in engines with marginal piston ring seal
Installation is fast and simple; no aligning timing marks, and no rotating parts
Made in the USA

Sidewinder Big Bore Stroker Kit
Contains nearly everything needed to take a stock 74" or 80" H-D. Shovelhead engine up to 93" or 96" displacement

Includes 3.625" bore high tensile, cast iron sidewinder cylinders and forged pistons with wrist pin and rings, a 4.5" or 4.625" stroke, dynamically balanced S&S flywheel assembly complete with S&S heavy duty connecting rods and mainshafts, S&S stainless steel head bolts, base nut, S&S adjustable chromoly steel pushrods, head gaskets, base gaskets, exhaust gaskets, and an S&S heavy-duty top motor mount
Made in the U.S.A.
100" Power Package - 585CE - Chain Drive - Silver - Twin Cam 88
Made in the USA
S&S 4.000" Big-Bore Cylinders, Piston Kits, S&S 585 Easy Start® Cams, S&S Quickee Pushrods, TC3 Cam Support Plate, TC3 Oil Pump, and Precision Hydraulic Tappets are included in this kit
S&S Cylinder
2x S&S 4.000" bore cylinders
Low friction ductile cast iron liner
Bolt in
No maching, balancing, or splitting the crankcase
Can be used with stock heads
Increase displacement from 88 ci to 100 ci
Piston Kit
2x 4.000" pistons for front and rear
2x 0.927" piston pins
4x Piston pin clips with installation tool
2x Ring packs which includes the top, second, oil rail and expander rings
Provides 10.5:1 compression ratio
S&S 585 Easy Start® Cam Specifications
Intake: Open 20° / Close 45° / Duration at 0.053" 245° / Valve Lift 0.585"
Exhaust: Open 60° / Close 20° / Duration at 0.053" 260° / Valve Lift 0.585"
S&S Quickee Pushrods
Adjustable with chrome tubes
TC3 Cam Support Plate and TC3 Oil Pump
Machined from aluminum forgings
Ensures consistent oil pressure and engine longevity
Precision Hydraulic Tappets
Close tolerances for low leak down rates
Reduced valve train noise from start to shut down
Not for '06 Dyna.
Not compatible with S&S 79 cc Super Stock® heads.
Not recommended for Tri-Glide or other three wheel models due to lugging nature of these bikes.
'99-'04 Twin Cams will require the additional purchase of valve spring kit (sold separately).

Made in the USA
124" Power Package - Gear Drive - Highlighted Fins - Chrome Pushrod Tubes - 107" M8
Made in the USA
Big Bore Kit
107" to 124" Big bore kit
Bolt on kit
No case matching required
Forged pistons
11:1 Compression ratio
Oil Pump/Cam Plate
Precision machined from billet aluminum
Blue anodized finish
Passage plugs removable for servicing
Independent scavenge sections for flywheel cavity and cam chest
Debris screens in both the scavenge pickups
Magnet in cam chest to help to stop debris from entering oil pump
Increased flow capacity on both feed and scavenge side
Adjustable pressure relief valve is adjustable with unit installed in engine
Pushrods
Quikee pushrods
Tappets
S&S precision tappets
Tappet Cuffs
Hard anodized black coating
Billet aluminum construction
Stronger than stock material eliminates distortion
Improve tappet stability in high lift and high rpm situations
Cam
S&S 550 cam-designed for big bore applications
Valve Springs
Works well with cams up to 0.605" lift
High performance conical single wire spring

S&S does not recommend compression ratios higher than 10:1 for Tri Glide® or other three wheel models (including conversions) due to extra loads caused by the lugging nature of these bikes. Detonation and subsequent engine damage may result.

Close tolerances for low leak down rates
Tappet Cuffs:
Hard anodized black coating
Billet aluminum construction
Tappet stability in high lift and high rpm sitiuations
Camshaft:
S&S 550 camshaft - designed for big bore applications
Valve Springs:
Works well with camshafts up to 0.605" lift
High performance conical single wire spring
Includes top collars, keepers, valve seals and bottom collars
132" High Compression | 136" Big Bore Kit - 4.320" Bore - Black w/Highlighted Fins - M8
132" high compression kit will work on 114"/117" motors with 4-1/2" stroke flywheels only
To achieve 136" big bore, S&S flywheel with 4-5/8" stroke is required (sold seperately).

132" high compression kit will work on 114"/117" motors with 4-1/2" stroke flywheels only

132" Power Pack - 550 Gear Drive - Oil Cooled - Black Granite w/Highlight Fins - 114"/117" M8
Big-bore bolt-in kit increases 114"/117" engine with 4.5" stroke M8 to 132" engine with no case machining required
4.32" bore cylinders with 11.0:1 compression ratio forged pistons
S&S oil pump/cam plate with blue anodized finish
Passage plugs are removable for servicing
Independent scavenge sections for flywheel cavity and cam chest
Debris screen in both scavenge pickups
Magnet in cam chest to help prevent debris from entering the oil pump
Increased oil flow capacity on both the oil feed and scavenge side
Adjustable pressure relief valve can be adjusted with the unit installed in the engine
Quickee pushrods
S&S premium tappets
S&S hard-anodized, black coated tappet cuffs are billet aluminum construction
S&S 550 cams are designed for big bore applications
S&S valve springs work with cams up to 0.605" lift
High-performance conical single wire spring design
Exhaust gasket, cylinder base gasket, and head gasket included
Made in the USA
Not for 121" CVO.

Black Edition includes all the features of standard S&S engines, with gloss black engine covers in place of the standard chrome covers
Cylinder heads on T-Series long block engines are 99-05 style. Owners of 06 models will need to purchase a set of 99-05 style, offset intake flanges.

Cylinder heads on these engines are specially machined to compensate for the non-stock cylinder length. As a result, they are compatible with manifolds and throttle bodies with stock length intake runners. In addition, the breather vent bolt locations have been adjusted so they are in the stock location, so stock style air cleaner back plates will bolt up to these engines.
Made in the U.S.A.

Tappets - Hydraulic - with HL2T Kit - Evolution Big Twin | XL
Rollers have a larger-than-stock inner bearing race that reduces stress and increases axle life
Each lifter body and plunger assembly is hand-fit and pressure-tested to ensure correct operation
Redesigned plunger assembly withstands forces associated with heavy-duty valve springs and pushrods typically used in high-performance applications
Revised metering device precisely controls oil delivery to top end, ensuring rapid lifter pump-up and reducing possibility of oil starvation to bottom end

Billet aluminum construction with hard anodized black coating
Easy upgrade when changing tappets or doing a cam change
Improve tappet stability in high lift and high rpm situations

Factory tappet guides are constructed of plastic and are at risk for allowing tappets to twist under heavy stress, these tappet cuffs capture the tappet without impacting vertical motion to keep them aligned without twisting

S&S® High performance valve springs allow the installation of camshafts with up to 0.650" lift
Intake ports flow 264 CFM (Cubic Feet per Minute) compared to stock heads at 182 CFM
Compatible with stock rocker boxes, exhaust, and intake manifolds
Made in the USA
Will not work with S&S compression releases in a late model twin cam that has Harley Davidson® ACR (Automatic Compression Release) already installed.
Not compatible with '14-'16 FLHTK/FLHTKL, FLHTCUTG Twin-Cooled motors or '17 touring models.
Not for models with OEM compression releases.
Must use S&S rocker boxes if S&S compression realses are used.

Retro Top End Conversion Kit
Give your Shovelhead engine that nostalgic look of a Panhead

Kit consists of a set of S&S P-series cylinder heads with rocker cradles, S&S roller rocker arms, S&S hydraulic tappets, billet tappet guides, Quickee pushrods, pushrod cover clips and all required gaskets and hardware for assembly
Heads have a Shovelhead bolt pattern, making them compatible with any stock or aftermarket cylinders for 66-84 Big Twins; heads come complete with valves and .590" lift valve springs
Accept stock or S&S O-ring-style manifolds for Shovelheads and any exhaust system made to fit a shovelhead engine
Kits do not include pan covers.

Features stock appearance, but flow better than stock heads
Use OEM manifolds and exhaust

Engine Case - +4.000" Bore - Special Application - Evolution Big Twin
Designed for high performance engines with cylinder bores 4.000"
Cam chest is moved outward 0.250" to allow crankcases to handle large cylinder bore sizes
Clearanced for strokes as long as 5.000"
Relocated cam chest oil pick-up increases gear case scavenging and virtually eliminates oil carry-over at sustained high speeds
Machined to accept the stock oil filter assembly used on '92-'99 Big Twins
A ported breather passageway and a machined breather window allows the air/oil mist to flow from the flywheel cavity to the cam chest of the engine with the least possible restriction
Crankcase venting can be achieved via two crankcase breathers, the cylinder heads, or both; S&S recommends using both crankcase breathers in engines larger than 95"
Deck height is 5.875"
Made in the USA

Machined for installation of a crank position sensor which allows the cases to be used in EFI applications and also allows easy installation of S&S IST Ignition and VFI Fuel Injection; a plug kit is included for applications that do not use a crank position sensor.

All S&S crankcases manufactured after June 1, '08 do not have case interlock groove and ring and do not use case alignment studs. Case mating surface is flat, and cases are aligned with alignment dowels.

Camshaft Kit - 510G Gear Drive - Twin Cam
Cams designed as bolt-in cam for 88", 95", 96" and 103" engines with compression ratios below 9.7:1
Kit includes camshafts with inner gears, outer cam drive gear kit and camshaft installation kit: gearcover gasket, bearings, oil passage block off kit, retaining ring. o-ring and instructions
Stock pushrods and valve springs are acceptable
Strongest from 3000-5500 RPM
Made in the USA
Camshaft Kit - 585G - Gear Drive -Twin Cam
Designed for 88/96/103/110 cubic-inch engines with compression ratios from 10.0:1 to 10.5:1
Reverses the rear cam's direction of rotation, providing additional operating clearance between cam lobes making higher cam lifts possible
Increases valve timing accuracy by eliminating chain lash and loosely fit stock chain drive
Material must be removed from inner surface of the stock gear cover to install
3500-6000 rpm for 88" to 103" engines and 2500-5500 rpm for larger engines
A hydraulic press and other professional level tool are required for installation
S&S recommends that adjustable pushrod/cover get be used
Cam bearings and gaskets must be replaced when installing new cams
Kit includes camshafts, inner gears, outer gears, inner bearings, outer bearings, gasket and instructions
Installer must check coil bind, valve to valve clearance and valve to piston clearance.
Due to the inherent characteristics of gear drives, more valve train noise may occur.
Made in the USA
Camshaft Kit - 625G - Gear Drive - Twin Cam
For 95/96/103 and 110 cubic inch engines with compression ratios from 10.0 to 10.75:1
Strongest from 3000-6000 rpm
Increase valve timing accuracy by eliminating timing chain lash and loosely-fit stock chain drive
Reverses the rear cam's direction of rotation, providing additional operating clearance between cam lobes, as a result, higher cam lifts are possible
Material must be removed from inner surface of the stock gear cover to install
A hydraulic press and other professional level tools are required to install the kit
High lift valve springs and adjustable pushrods required
Camshaft bearings and gaskets must be replaced when installing new camshafts
Kit includes camshafts, inner gear, outer drive gears, inner, outer bearings, gasket and instructions
Made in the USA
Installer must check coil bind, valve to valve clearance and valve to piston clearance.
Due to inherent characteristics of gear drives, you may experience more valve train noise.

Camshaft Kit - Easy Start - 551 Chain Drive - Big Twin '99-'06

Allows for easy start by initially reducing crank compression, but once the engine starts and rpm increases, the compression release lobe is centrifugally retracted and the engine runs normally, with full compression, and without any loss in performance
Optimized for 88"/96"/103" to 106" Touring bike with slip-on mufflers and 9.0:1 to 9.0:9 compression with stock starter
Bolt-in for stock or mildly modified Touring models
Greatly improves low-end and midrange torque
Strongest from idle to 4000 rpm
Includes camshafts, gearcover gasket, bearings, retaining ring, o-ring, threat lock and instructions
Made in the USA
Not recommended for compression ratios of 10.0:1 or greater.
Installer must check coil bind, valve-to-valve clearance and valve-to-piston clearance.
Not for models with OEM compression releases.
Can be used with stock pushrods, lifters, and springs (unless noted).

Camshaft Kit - 585G - Gear Drive -Twin Cam
Designed for 88/96/103/110 cubic-inch engines with compression ratios from 10.0:1 to 10.5:1
Reverses the rear cam's direction of rotation, providing additional operating clearance between cam lobes making higher cam lifts possible
Increases valve timing accuracy by eliminating chain lash and loosely fit stock chain drive
Material must be removed from inner surface of the stock gear cover to install
3500-6000 rpm for 88" to 103" engines and 2500-5500 rpm for larger engines
A hydraulic press and other professional level tool are required for installation
S&S recommends that adjustable pushrod/cover get be used
Cam bearings and gaskets must be replaced when installing new cams
Kit includes camshafts, inner gears, outer gears, inner bearings, outer bearings, gasket and instructions
Installer must check coil bind, valve to valve clearance and valve to piston clearance.
Due to the inherent characteristics of gear drives, more valve train noise may occur.
Made in the USA

S&S 3-piece flywheels with integral main shafts are the strongest yet, made from 4140 steel and feature a larger 1.671" crankpin
Fits directly in stock crankcases with no modifications
Made in the U.S.A.
Flywheel assembly without sprocket bearing race are designed for use with Timken bearing conversion (sold separately).

Feature three-piece assembled flywheels with shafts

For 96"/103"/106" big bore | 110"/117" engine with stock or S&S pistons (will be noted)
Fully assembled with premium quaility S&S® heavy duty 7.659" connecting rods, with full width wrist pin ends, and dynamically balanced

Pinion and sprocket shafts are forged as part of the flywheel

Camshaft Kit - Easy Start - 583 Gear Drive - Big Twin '99-'06 (except '06 Dyna)

Allows for easy start by initially reducing crank compression, but once the engine starts and rpm increases, the compression release lobe is centrifugally retracted and the engine runs normally, with full compression, and without any loss in performance
Optimiized for use as a great overall camshaft for Softail and Dyna, but can be used in any Big Twin
Provides strong low-end torque and horsepower
Strongest from 1500 rpm to 5000 rpm in Softail and Dyna models
Bolt-in
Includes camshafts, gearcover gasket, bearings, retaining ring, o-ring, threat lock and instructions
Made in the USA
Installer must check coil bind, valve-to-valve clearance and valve-to-piston clearance.
Not for models with OEM compression releases.
Not recommended for compression ratios of 10.0:1 or greater.
Camshaft Kit - Easy Start - 585 Gear Drive - Big Twin '99-'06 (except '06 Dyna)

Allows for easy start by initially reducing crank compression, but once the engine starts and rpm increases, the compression release lobe is centrifugally retracted and the engine runs normally, with full compression, and without any loss in performance
Designed for 88 - 106 CID engines with compression ratios from 9.7:1 to 10.5:1 and 106 - 124 CID engines from 9.0:1 to 10.0:1 compression
Provides massive horsepower and torque increasses starting at 3000 rpm and hold steady to redline
3500 rpm - 6000 rpm for 88"-103" engines and 2200 rpm - 5000 rpm for larger engines
Bolt-in
Includes camshafts, gearcover gasket, bearings, retaining ring, o-ring, threat lock and instructions
Made in the USA
Installer must check coil bind, valve-to-valve clearance and valve-to-piston clearance.
Not for models with OEM compression releases.

Oil Pump with Cam Plate
Precision CNC machined forged aluminum
Increased structural strength
Dimensional stability
Freedom for internal porosity
Separate scavenge sections for flywheel cavity and cam chest scavenge each area more efficiently with no interference
Gerotors are designed to tolerate more pinion shaft runout without damage
Cam chest pic up features a magnetic trap to protect scavenge rotors from metal debris
Both scavenge rotors are protected from debris, the most common cause of stock oil pump failure
Passage plugs are removable for service
Bronze pinion shaft bushing in all models and bronze cam bushings in 07-15 style can be replaced
Adjustable oil pressure regulator - adjust without removing plate from engine

99-06 cam support plate is designed to use late style hydraulic cam chain tensioners because stock spring-loaded tensioners used in 99-06 models don't adequately control the valve train at high rpm, especially with higher lift cams or performance valve springs

HVHP oil pumps have a new gear tooth profile with fewer but larger teeth that provides an increased oil volume for both supply and return-side of the pump
Supply-side gears are 9% wider than stock

Works great with 88" to 103" stock motors, but are ideal for larger stroker or big bore engines up to 110"
Large 1.940" intake and 1.575" exhaust valve maintain port velocity for good low and midrange response, but supply enough air for stock and slightly larger engines to perform to their full potential
S&S® High performance valve springs allow the installation of camshafts with up to .650" lift (unless noted)
Heads can be decked up to 0.060" to increase compression
Compatible with stock rocker boxes, exhaust, and intake manifolds (unless noted)
Heads are machined for compression releases (sold separately)
High port flow gives great performance now, and more later when additional upgrades are done
Made in the USA
If cams with higher TDC lifts are used or if heads are decked, piston valve pockets will require re-machining.
Does not include rocker arm components, intake manifold or gaskets.
Should not be used with any piston having a pop up dome.
Must use S&S rocker boxes if S&S compression releases are used.
Cylinder Heads - 79 cc - Super Stock® - Twin Cam
Heads are fully assembled with springs and valves
Designed for stock 88" to 103" engines or slightly modified engines up to 110"
Moderately sized 1.940" intake and 1.575" exhaust valves maintain port velocity in smaller displacement engines for good low and midrange response
S&S® High performance valve springs allow the installation of camshafts with up to .650" lift
Combustion chamber provides a significantly higher than stock, but still manageable compression ratio
Heads can be decked up to .060" to increase compression, but will require piston valve pockets to be re-machined
Compatible with stock rocker boxes, exhaust, and intake manifolds
Machined for S&S® electric or manual compression releases
Made in the USA
Should not be used with any piston having a pop up dome.
Not compatible with '14-'16 FLHTK/FLHTKL, FLHTCUTG Twin-Cooled motors or '17 touring models.
Must use the included S&S valve cover gasket kit with stock rocker covers.
Must use S&S rocker boxes if S&S compression releases are used.

HVHP Oil Pump Cover - Universal
HVHP oil pumps have a new gear tooth profile with fewer but larger teeth that provides an increased oil volume for both supply and return-side of the pump
Supply-side gears are 9% wider than stock

Return gears are 28% wider than stock to ensure that the additional volume of oil supplied to the engine is scavenged and returned to the oil tank, reducing the amount of oil in the crankcase breather

Pumps are available in universal and standard styles; universal style has a number of oil feed and return options allowing maximum flexibility for custom installations, while standard has '92-'99 style oil line hookups

Kit includes supply gears, return gears, drive shaft, drive shaft keys, drive shaft snap rings, check ball, check ball spring, pressure valve spring, cover screws with O-rings, miscellaneous hose fittings, plugs, screws, gaskets, mounting hardware, oil pump drive shaft gear, oil pump pinion shaft gear, S&S breather gear and shim kit and instructions

Oil pumps only include supply gears, return gears, drive shaft keys, drive shaft snap rings, check ball, check ball spring, pressure valve spring, cover screws with O-rings, miscellaneous hose fittings, plugs, screws, gaskets, mounting hardware and instructions
Made in USA

Tappet Alignment Tool

Big Twin Evolution tappet blocks do not have counter-bored bolt holes; therefore, when a tappet block is removed (or even just loosened) it should be reinstalled using an alignment tool to ensure that the lifters track properly on the camshaft
This tool makes the process quick and easy, ensuring the durability of your installation
Also aligns Twin Cam oil pump to the cam support plate; two tools required

Cylinder Head Temp Sensor - Harley Davidson

The S&S system makes use of crank position sensor, cam position sensor if present, MAP sensor, cylinder head temperature sensor and an exclusive knock sensor that detects detonation or knock while the engine runs
Knock sensor allows the ECU to automatically adjust ignition timing to eliminate knock whenever it occurs
Optimizes power and fuel economy
The Intelligent Spark Technology Ignition Module requires an installation kit that must be purchased separately

Optional high-output coil also available: designed for the S&S Variable Fuel Injection System, the single-fire coil is actually two separate coils in a single package; coil impedance 3 ohm per coil (sold separately)
Made in the U.S.A.
Not for fuel-injected models.
Not recommended for kick start applications unless a cam position sensor is used. Engines using crankshaft position sensors will be difficult to kick start.

S&S IST ignition modules manufactured after 10-1-03 (serial number begins with "E" or higher letter) already contain software to support the Guardian Diagnostic System. These modules will work in all applications except 2004-05. Modules manufactured after 10-1-05 (serial number begins with "G" or higher letter) are compatible with 04-05 models in addition to the other specified applications.
Map Sensor

The S&S system makes use of crank position sensor, cam position sensor if present, MAP sensor, cylinder head temperature sensor and an exclusive knock sensor that detects detonation or knock while the engine runs
Knock sensor allows the ECU to automatically adjust ignition timing to eliminate knock whenever it occurs

The Intelligent Spark Technology Ignition Module requires an installation kit that must be purchased separately

Optional high-output coil also available: designed for the S&S Variable Fuel Injection System, the single-fire coil is actually two separate coils in a single package; coil impedance 3 ohm per coil (sold separately)
Made in the U.S.A.
Not for fuel-injected models.
Not recommended for kick start applications unless a cam position sensor is used. Engines using crankshaft position sensors will be difficult to kick start.

S&S IST ignition modules manufactured after 10-1-03 (serial number begins with "E" or higher letter) already contain software to support the Guardian Diagnostic System. These modules will work in all applications except 2004-05. Modules manufactured after 10-1-05 (serial number begins with "G" or higher letter) are compatible with 04-05 models in addition to the other specified applications.
Crank Position Sensor

The S&S system makes use of crank position sensor, cam position sensor if present, MAP sensor, cylinder head temperature sensor and an exclusive knock sensor that detects detonation or knock while the engine runs
Knock sensor allows the ECU to automatically adjust ignition timing to eliminate knock whenever it occurs
Optimizes power and fuel economy
The Intelligent Spark Technology Ignition Module requires an installation kit that must be purchased separately

Optional high-output coil also available: designed for the S&S Variable Fuel Injection System, the single-fire coil is actually two separate coils in a single package; coil impedance 3 ohm per coil (sold separately)
Made in the U.S.A.
Not for fuel-injected models.
Not recommended for kick start applications unless a cam position sensor is used. Engines using crankshaft position sensors will be difficult to kick start.

Connecting Rod - Evolution Big Twin '84-'99
High-quality, heavy duty rod sets come complete and ready to install
Set includes front and rear rods, crankpin and nuts, steel cages and roller bearings
Crankpin has two oil holes and four slots ground on each side of the throw ends of the rods to help maintain the oil film on thrust faces
Rods are deep-forged and heat-treated, 0.120" wider than stock in the I-beam section and feature rod-to-rod clearance to accommodate strokes up to and including 5.00"
Made in the USA
Installation of rod sets may require additional clearancing of flywheels and cases.
Billet Oil Pump

Kit includes an oil pump with cover, mounting bolts, supply and return gears, drive shaft with keys and snap rings, check ball and spring, pressure relief valve and spring, check ball and release valve cover screws with O-rings, miscellaneous hose fittings, plugs, screws and gaskets
Pump features a smoother design and pressure relief towers that are .300" shorter than the OEM oil pump
Accepts OEM steel oil lines and have late-style mounting bolt pattern
Replacement rebuild kits and pump gaskets available separately
Made in the U.S.A.

Standard covers features top and bottom feeds, universal covers have a number of oil feed and return options, allowing maximum flexibility for customized applications
